title: pithecoctenium xanthophyllum
intro: Pithecoctenium xanthophyllum, also known as the 'Yellow-flowered Strangler' or 'Yellow-flowered Vincetoxicum', is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pithecoctenium xanthophyllum include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
